name: 4c Round Glass Food Storage Container - Figmint™
description:
Simplify everyday food storage with this 4-Cup Round Glass Food Storage Container from Figmint™. Made from glass, this round container features a fluted exterior and a snap-on lid to help keep food neatly contained. Top-rack dishwasher safe for easy cleaning and freezer safe for storage, the container is also microwave safe without its lid.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
